changelog: Updated media permission descriptions for Google Play Store compliance
Refined delivery information to reflect accurate doorstep and flexible options
Redesigned Home Page for a cleaner, modern, and professional aesthetic
Introduced premium illustrated avatars to replace the previous emoji system
Renamed Recommended Products to Just for You for a more personalized experience
Improved UI consistency by Removing all emojis across the application
Enhanced product variant display with accurate unit price calculations
Increased profile avatar size in the app bar for better visibility
Fixed login screen button layout and alignment issues
Resolved product navigation bugs from cart and order history pages
Improved location service reliability and city detection accuracy
Firebase push notification support and general stability enhancements
